ValidationRule.description: Deletion or update on the Auto created fee slip line items is not allowed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND(!$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, leaseworks__Auto_Created__c = True ,OR( ISCHANGED( leaseworks__Line_Amount__c ) ,ISCHANGED( leaseworks__Line_Type__c ) )) , true, false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Deletion or update on the Auto created fee slip line items is not allowed.
